description: Read, filter, and extract links from Marginal Revolution through its public RSS feed

novel_features.name: Recent-feed search
novel_features.description: Search the current public RSS feed by title, excerpt, body text, author, and category.

novel_features.name: Outbound link extraction
novel_features.description: Extract external links from recent posts so agents can quickly follow cited sources.

novel_features.name: Feed taxonomy scan
novel_features.description: Summarize category counts in the current feed for quick topical orientation.
